{tier}/{service}/{type}

・Root CA 直接利用禁止

パス: pki_int/issue/{tier}

div.div:
Vault Agent Injector パターン
Pod annotations:
vault.hashicorp.com/agent-inject: true
vault.hashicorp.com/role: {service}
マウントパス:
/vault/secrets/db-password
/vault/secrets/db-creds
/vault/secrets/api-key
/vault/secrets/redis-password
/vault/secrets/kafka-sasl

div.div:
シークレットローテーションフロー
┌─────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────┐
│ Vault │───→│ Injector │───→│ Pod │
│ 生成 │ │ 注入 │ │ 読取 │
└─────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────┘
↑ │
└──── TTL 期限切れ → 自動更新 ─┘
ローテーション間隔:
DB パスワード: 24h (自動)
API キー: 90日 (手動)
TLS 証明書: 90日 (自動)
JWT 署名鍵: 90日 (Keycloak)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.div:
監査ログ
・全認証試行 (成功/失敗)
・全シークレット読取操作
・ポリシー変更
・設定変更
・シークレット値マスク
(log_raw: false)

div.div:
Tier 別アクセスポリシー (最小権限)
2階層構造:
1. Bootstrap Tier ポリシー
(k1s0-system.hcl 等)
2. サービス固有ポリシー
(auth-server.hcl 等)
K8s Auth ロール:
token_policies:
["k1s0-system", "auth-server"]

Docker マルチステージビルド
Build: rust:1.88-bookworm
golang:1.23-alpine
Runtime: distroless
gcr.io/distroless/cc-debian12
gcr.io/distroless/static-debian12
・非 root 実行 (nonroot)
・攻撃面最小化
・不要ツール排除

div.div:
Trivy 脆弱性スキャン
・CI: filesystem scan
・Push 時: Harbor 組込
・日次: image scan
ポリシー:
CRITICAL → push ブロック
HIGH → push ブロック
MEDIUM → 警告のみ
LOW → 記録のみ

div.div:
Cosign Keyless 署名
・GitHub OIDC Identity
・Sigstore Fulcio (証明書)
・Sigstore Rekor (透明性ログ)
・鍵管理不要
cosign sign --yes \
harbor.../image:tag
COSIGN_EXPERIMENTAL=1

div.div:
Harbor レジストリ
プロジェクト構成:
k1s0-system/
k1s0-business/
k1s0-service/
k1s0-infra/
・ロボットアカウント認証
・Trivy 自動スキャン
・タグ保持ポリシー

K8s Admission Webhook
・Cosign 署名検証
・Kyverno / OPA Gatekeeper
・未署名イメージ拒否
cosign verify \
--certificate-oidc-issuer
https://token.actions.
githubusercontent.com
--certificate-identity-regexp
github.com/k1s0-org/k1s0

div.div: Section 4: ネットワークセキュリティ

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1070px; margin-left: 31px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;

div.div:
Calico CNI + NetworkPolicy
(L3/L4 ネットワーク制御)
・Namespace 間の通信制御
・Pod レベルのファイアウォール
・IP ベースのアクセス制御
・Istio AuthorizationPolicy と連携
(NetworkPolicy: L3/L4
AuthorizationPolicy: L7)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 310px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1305px; margin-left: 31px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: 'Courier New'; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Namespace 分離
┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
│ k1s0-system │
│ auth / config / saga / dlq-manager │
│ bff-proxy / vault / scheduler ... │
├─────────────────────────────────────┤
│ k1s0-business │
│ ドメイン別ビジネスサーバー │
├─────────────────────────────────────┤
│ k1s0-service │
│ BFF / エンドユーザー向けサービス │
├─────────────────────────────────────┤
│ ingress / messaging / observability │
│ service-mesh / vault │
└─────────────────────────────────────┘

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 330px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1150px; margin-left: 371px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: 'Courier New'; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Istio AuthorizationPolicy
(L7 Tier ベースアクセス制御)
┌───────────────────────────────────┐
│ allow-from-lower-tiers (system) │
│ FROM: k1s0-business, k1s0-service│
│ FROM: k1s0-system (同一Tier) │
├───────────────────────────────────┤
│ allow-from-service-tier (business)│
│ FROM: k1s0-service │
│ FROM: k1s0-business (同一Tier) │
├───────────────────────────────────┤
│ allow-from-ingress (service) │
│ FROM: ingress │
│ FROM: k1s0-service (同一Tier) │
├───────────────────────────────────┤
│ deny-bff-to-bff (service) │
│ DENY: *-bff-sa → BFF component │
│ (BFF 間の直接通信を禁止) │
└───────────────────────────────────┘

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1390px; margin-left: 371px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Tier 間通信ルール (一方向)
service → business → system
(上位 Tier を呼び出し可能)
system → business: 禁止
business → service: 禁止
BFF → BFF: 禁止

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 240px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1068px; margin-left: 731px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Kong セキュリティ機能
・JWT 検証 (JWKS エンドポイント)
・レート制限 (IP / Consumer)
・CORS ポリシー制御
・Bot 検出
・リクエストサイズ制限
・IP ホワイトリスト

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 240px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1235px; margin-left: 731px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Redis セキュリティ (本番)
・SASL/SCRAM 認証
・Vault 管理パスワード
・Redis Sentinel (HA)
・パス: secret/data/k1s0/
system/redis/password

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 240px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1385px; margin-left: 731px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Kafka セキュリティ (本番)
・SASL/SCRAM-SHA-512
・TLS 暗号化
・KRaft モード
・パス: secret/data/k1s0/
system/kafka/sasl
(username, password)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 210px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1075px; margin-left: 1011px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
多層防御モデル
L3/L4: Calico NetworkPolicy
↓
L7: Istio AuthorizationPolicy
↓
App: Kong JWT/Rate Limit
↓
App: サービス内 RBAC

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 960px; margin-left: 1493px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Section 5: 暗号化とデータ保護

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 240px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1078px; margin-left: 1521px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Encryption in Transit
(通信の暗号化)
・TLS 1.3 (外部通信)
・mTLS (メッシュ内部)
- Istio STRICT モード
- 24h 証明書ローテーション
・Kafka TLS (本番)
・Redis TLS (本番)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 240px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1078px; margin-left: 1801px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Encryption at Rest
(保存時の暗号化)
・PostgreSQL TDE
(Transparent Data Encryption)
・Ceph RBD 暗号化
(ストレージレベル)
・Vault KV v2
(シークレット暗号化保管)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 230px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1105px; margin-left: 2081px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
アプリケーションレベル暗号化
(k1s0-encryption ライブラリ)
対称暗号:
・AES-256-GCM
・generate_aes_key (32byte)
・aes_encrypt / aes_decrypt
・Base64 エンコード
非対称暗号:
・RSA-OAEP-SHA256 (2048bit)
・PEM 形式鍵ペア生成
・rsa_encrypt / rsa_decrypt

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 210px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1268px; margin-left: 1521px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
パスワードハッシュ
・Argon2id
(メモリハード関数)
・hash_password()
・verify_password()
・argon2 crate v0.5
・golang.org/x/crypto

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 240px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1273px; margin-left: 1801px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
鍵管理
・Vault PKI エンジン
(pki_int/ マウント)
・Intermediate CA 経由
・Root CA 直接利用禁止
・zeroize クレート
(メモリ上の秘密鍵を
確実にゼロ消去)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1345px; margin-left: 2081px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: 'Courier New'; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 210px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1090px; margin-left: 2391px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: 'Courier New'; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
データ保護フロー
PII データ 暗号化キー
│ │
↓ ↓
k1s0-encryption Vault
(AES-256-GCM) (キー供給)
│ │
↓ ↓
暗号化保管 キーローテ
(PostgreSQL) (自動)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1258px; margin-left: 2393px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 凡例 (Legend)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1290px; margin-left: 2443px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
